purpose: Seed policy for deciding which IPTV channels should be kept, reviewed, or excluded before generating TiviMate-ready outputs.

include_rules.name: target_country_provider_lineups
include_rules.description: Keep channels from subscribed XMLTV lineup pulls unless a later scope rule excludes the category.

include_rules.name: target_country_reference_channels
include_rules.description: Keep or review channels extracted from curated UK/AU reference inputs.

exclude_rules.name: non_target_country
exclude_rules.description: Exclude channels outside CA, US, UK, and AU unless manually allowed.

exclude_rules.name: sports_default
exclude_rules.description: Exclude sports channels by default unless manually allowed.

exclude_rules.name: non_english_default
exclude_rules.description: Exclude channels that are clearly non-English by default unless manually allowed.

category_policy.notes: english only, no religion, no sports, no government, no forigien contents

fast_policy.notes: include Pluto and Plex but not Samsung and Rakuten, some Pluto and Plex i sill exlude as i see the scope list of them.

provider_lineup_policy.reason: Daily subscribed pulls are source-of-truth inputs and should be filtered downstream.
